action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 11 completed a 15-epoch DINOv2 training run (~102 min) with domain-balanced sampling, Mixup, and EMA. Source-domain validation accuracy reached 30.8%. The last submitted eval (2 epochs) was 4.71% Quickdraw accuracy. Analysis: I need to measure how much the 15-epoch run improved target-domain generalization before deciding whether to scale further or tune hyperparameters. Decision: Write an updated predict.py that handles batched inference and optional horizontal-flip TTA, then immediately submit the current best checkpoint for evaluation.
